spec_match.rationale: The CSS selectors correctly map standard values (all, none, start, end, start end) to the text-decoration-skip-spaces property.

interactive.rationale: Features reactive button toggles that instantly modify the data attribute on the stage container, updating the underline decoration style in real time.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches parent description perfectly, letting authors toggle each option on linked text and inspect space skips.

edge_cases.rationale: The demo works assuming the browser supports the property, but does not contain any CSS.supports() fallback warning or capability detection banner to guide users on non-supporting browsers.

references.rationale: Provides direct links to both the parent feature index and the target ChromeStatus entry.

design_system.rationale: Excellent conformance to colors, borders, fonts, and crumb layout conventions.

openQuestions.title: Implement browser capability probe and warning banner
openQuestions.detail: Because text-decoration-skip-spaces is a brand new CSS4 feature, we should add a simple CSS.supports('text-decoration-skip-spaces', 'all') check in JavaScript. If the property is not supported in the current browser, we should display a warning banner ('Not supported in this browser; showing static fallback rendering') so developers understand the status.

summary: A solid, simple interactive toggle demo that successfully demonstrates CSS4 space skipping properties. It is fully compliant with design constraints, but should be fortified with browser capability detection to prevent silent failures on unsupported browsers.
